extraction.one_line_summary: VAN AERT Wout attacked solo from chasing group to bridge to leaders in decisive white road sector, demonstrating superior gravel strength
tactical_patterns: VAN AERT Wout bridged solo from chase to lead group on white roads, forcing immediate counterattacks upon arrival
Lead group tactics paralyzed by unknown breakaway rider's presence, treating him as unpredictable joker rather than dismissing

rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: bridged alone across significant gap on gravel sectors then immediately attacked again upon contact with leaders
rider_signals.BENOOT Tiesj: neutral: present in lead selection but appears passive during VAN AERT's aggressive bridging effort
